emails.subject: FW: NETCO
emails.body: FW: NETCO I copied this email list and copied Rita Wynne, Stacey White by mistake which obviously I shouldn't have done.

emails.subject: FW: NETCO
emails.body: FW: NETCO Who is doing the Gas Logistics restart plan? Bob Superty hopefully

emails.subject: RE: NETCO
emails.body: RE: NETCO I talked to Bob on Friday. He is involved with Jay and the IT people on the system plan. The only item open, I think, is a deal with EC Outlook concerning the EDI Hub. Jay and Bob McAllif are working with them. Won't need right way, used for physical gas. He is also working on a list of contracts needed with the pipelines and LDC's. I'll keep you posted if I see any problems with logistics. thanks bob

emails.subject: RE: NETCO
emails.body: You will be sending me a plan tomorrow for all of Energy Ops though won't you?
